title: BharatBench question
description: Schema for entries in dataset/{language}/questions.json. The 'source' field is required for all new questions so provenance/human-verification can be audited -- see CONTRIBUTING.md.

requires_tool.description: Informational only -- NOT currently enforced by eval/runner.py. Questions marked true are still answered via plain chat completion, with no actual calculator/code-execution tool call. See README.md#known-limitations.

source.description: Provenance of the question: who wrote/adapted it, and from where (e.g. a textbook, an original hand-written item, a contributor handle). Must not be empty or a placeholder.
